description_long: This is a sleek, modern lotion bottle with a gently curved rectangular body and a slightly tapered profile, giving it an ergonomic and stylish appearance. The front face features a printed logo and branding, while the rest of the surface is smooth and unadorned. The bottle is predominantly white with subtle gray accents along the edges and top, contributing to a clean, minimalist aesthetic. At the top, there is a small cylindrical dispenser nozzle, likely for controlled dispensing of lotion. The cap appears integrated with the nozzle, suggesting a push or squeeze mechanism. The overall design is compact and portable, suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A modern, white lotion bottle with a curved rectangular shape, smooth surface, and a small dispenser nozzle on top. Features minimalist branding and subtle gray accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the logo, branding, and the full width of the curved rectangular body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim, tapered profile and the protruding dispenser nozzle at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, smooth back surface without any branding or graphics.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the slim profile and showing the nozzle from a different angle.
